drills.name: Knee-Hip-Feet Throwing Progression
drills.description: Pairs throw from one knee, then standing with hips only, then with full footwork, ten throws per phase at 10-15 yards.
drills.coachingPoints: Elbow above the shoulder, follow through to the opposite pocket.

drills.name: Three-Step Drop and Fire
drills.description: Quarterbacks take a snap, execute a three-step drop between cones, and deliver on time to a stationary target at a marked spot.
drills.coachingPoints: Big first step, ball high through the drop, throw the instant the back foot plants.

drills.name: Sprint-Out Throws
drills.description: Quarterback sprints laterally around a cone arc and throws on the move to a receiver running a matching flat route. Work both directions.
drills.coachingPoints: Square your shoulders to the target even while your feet keep moving.

drills.name: Route Tree on Air
drills.description: Receivers run the route tree one route at a time against no defense — slant, out, curl, post, go — with a throw on every rep.
drills.coachingPoints: Sell every route like a go until the break, then snap it off sharp.

drills.name: Hands Catching Circuit
drills.description: Partners work five stations of ten catches each: high balls, low balls, over-the-shoulder, one-handed stabs, and rapid-fire short throws.
drills.coachingPoints: Eyes to the tip of the ball, catch with your hands, then tuck.

drills.name: High-Point Fade Balls
drills.description: Receiver and defender jog side by side down the sideline; coach lofts a fade and both compete to catch it at its highest point. Switch roles each rep.
drills.coachingPoints: Attack the ball at its peak — go get it, don't wait for it.

drills.name: Release Ladder
drills.description: Receiver works a single-move release (foot fire, swipe, or speed release) against a partner shading press alignment, then bursts five yards upfield. Switch roles.
drills.coachingPoints: Attack their leverage foot and get their hands off you in one move.

drills.name: Gauntlet Ball Security
drills.description: Ball carrier runs a tight lane between two lines of teammates who punch, slap, and rip at the ball the whole way through.
drills.coachingPoints: Five points of pressure — eagle claw, forearm, bicep, chest, high and tight.

drills.name: Cone Cut Reaction
drills.description: Ball carrier runs at a cone triangle; coach points left or right at the last second and the runner plants and cuts that way at full speed.
drills.coachingPoints: Plant the outside foot and get your shoulders downhill immediately.

drills.name: Handoff Exchange Circle
drills.description: Players jog a continuous circle exchanging one ball with proper mesh: quarterback seats the ball, runner forms the pocket, secures, and hands to the next.
drills.coachingPoints: Inside elbow up, eyes forward — take the ball with your pocket, never your eyes.

drills.name: 2v1 Open Field
drills.description: Two ball carriers with one ball attack one defender in a 15-yard-wide alley; the runner uses the extra man, a cut, or speed to cross the line untouched.
drills.coachingPoints: Make one decisive move — hesitation is what gets you caught in space.

drills.name: Fit and Freeze Form Tackle
drills.description: Partners walk through the tackle fit: leverage step, chest to thigh, head across, arms wrapped — then freeze so the coach checks every position. No one goes to the ground.
drills.coachingPoints: Eyes up, head across the body, hips low — see what you hit.

drills.name: Angle Pursuit to the Sideline
drills.description: Ball carrier runs a sideline path at three-quarter speed; defender starts inside and behind, sprinting an intercept angle to tag or two-hand touch before the cone.
drills.coachingPoints: Aim where they're going, not where they are.

drills.name: Bag Wrap and Drive
drills.description: Defender fits on a tackle bag, wraps, and drives it back five yards with churning feet while a partner braces it. Three reps, rotate.
drills.coachingPoints: Wrap and run your feet through contact — the tackle ends five yards later.

drills.name: Stance and Get-Off
drills.description: Linemen align in a three-point stance; on a varied cadence, everyone fires out three steps low and flat. Coach checks stance and first step every rep.
drills.coachingPoints: Flat back, weight balanced, explode on the sound — not the guess.

drills.name: Mirror Punch Pass Pro
drills.description: Blocker kick-slides to mirror a partner's lateral rushes inside a five-yard lane, landing a two-hand punch to the chest plate each time the rusher closes.
drills.coachingPoints: Thumbs up, elbows in, punch on their move — feet never cross.

drills.name: Drive Block on Bags
drills.description: Blocker fires from stance into a held blocking pad, strikes with hands inside, and drives it five yards on a straight line. Three reps, rotate holders.
drills.coachingPoints: Low pad wins — strike up and through with your hips behind your hands.

drills.name: Sprint Ladder and Pro Agility
drills.description: Two stations: quick-feet patterns through an agility ladder, then the 5-10-5 pro agility shuttle between cones. Everyone cycles both twice.
drills.coachingPoints: Fast feet in the ladder, low hips and hand-touch the line in the shuttle.

drills.name: Play Execution on Air
drills.description: Full offense runs the install plays against no defense at full speed: break the huddle, align, execute assignments, finish ten yards downfield.
drills.coachingPoints: Perfect alignment and full-speed finish — walkthrough pace teaches walkthrough habits.

drills.name: Situational 7-on-7
drills.description: Skill players run 7-on-7 with the coach calling down, distance, and clock before each snap — third and long, red zone, two-minute drill.
drills.coachingPoints: Know the situation before the snap — the down and distance picks your decision for you.
